mapper.sql: select id, name, manufacturer, suitable_age, stock, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_multi_dose, total_doses, interval_days, dose_schedule from vaccine_information
mapper.insert:
insert into vaccine_information
name, manufacturer, suitable_age, stock, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
is_multi_dose, total_doses, interval_days, dose_schedule,
#{name}, #{manufacturer}, #{suitableAge}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
#{isMultiDose}, #{totalDoses}, #{intervalDays}, #{doseSchedule},
mapper.update:
update vaccine_information
name = #{name}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, suitable_age = #{suitableAge}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
is_multi_dose = #{isMultiDose}, total_doses = #{totalDoses}, interval_days = #{intervalDays}, dose_schedule = #{doseSchedule},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from vaccine_information where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: where is_multi_dose = 1 and status = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
select count(*) from vaccine_information where status = '0'
select count(*) from vaccine_information where status = '0'

SELECT CASE suitable_age WHEN 1 THEN '婴儿' WHEN 2 THEN '儿童' WHEN 3 THEN '青少年' WHEN 4 THEN '成人' WHEN 5 THEN '老人' ELSE '其他' END as ageGroup, COUNT(*) as count FROM vaccine_information WHERE status = '0' GROUP BY suitable_age ORDER BY suitable_age ASC
mapper.update:
update vaccine_information set status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT v.id as vaccineId, v.name as vaccineName, v.manufacturer as manufacturer, v.stock as stock, COUNT(a.id) as appointmentCount FROM vaccine_information v LEFT JOIN vaccine_appointment a ON v.id = a.vaccine_id AND a.status IN ('1', '2') WHERE v.status = '0' GROUP BY v.id, v.name, v.manufacturer, v.stock ORDER BY appointmentCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT v.id as vaccineId, v.name as vaccineName, v.stock as totalStock, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('1', '2') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as usedCount, (v.stock - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('1', '2') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) as remainingStock, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status IN ('1', '2') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / v.stock, 0), 1) as usageRate FROM vaccine_information v LEFT JOIN vaccine_appointment a ON v.id = a.vaccine_id WHERE v.status = '0' GROUP BY v.id, v.name, v.stock ORDER BY usageRate DESC
mapper.insert:
insert into vaccine_information (name, manufacturer, suitable_age, stock, status, description, is_multi_dose, total_doses, interval_days, dose_schedule, create_time) values
(#{item.name}, #{item.manufacturer}, #{item.suitableAge}, #{item.stock}, #{item.status}, #{item.description}, #{item.isMultiDose}, #{item.totalDoses}, #{item.intervalDays}, #{item.doseSchedule}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT manufacturer, COUNT(*) as count FROM vaccine_information WHERE status = '0' GROUP BY manufacturer ORDER BY count DESC
